description: Comprehensive volume and traffic analytics for Grafana — request volumes by handler, bytes transferred, response sizes, proxy throughput, API call volumes by category, and growth trends.

panels.description: Dashboard header — Grafana Volume & Traffic Analytics

options.content:
Grafana — Volume & Traffic Analytics
Request Volumes • Handler Traffic • Proxy Throughput • API Category Analysis • Growth Trends

panels.description: Total HTTP request rate across all handlers and status codes.
panels.title: Total Request Rate

panels.description: Rate of successful 2xx HTTP responses per second.
panels.title: 2xx Responses/sec

panels.description: Rate of client error 4xx HTTP responses per second.
panels.title: 4xx Responses/sec

panels.description: Rate of server error 5xx HTTP responses per second. Green < 0.1, Yellow < 1, Red >= 1.
panels.title: 5xx Responses/sec

panels.description: Rate of requests hitting proxy/datasource endpoints per second.
panels.title: Proxy Request Rate

panels.description: Rate of requests to dashboard API endpoints per second.
panels.title: Dashboard API Rate

panels.description: Total HTTP request volume over time broken down by response status code class (2xx, 3xx, 4xx, 5xx). Stacked area reveals the proportion of each status class.
panels.title: Total Request Volume

panels.description: Request volume broken down by handler category — Dashboards, Proxy, Search, Alerting, Admin/User, and Other. Stacked to show relative traffic distribution.
panels.title: Request Volume by Handler Category

panels.description: Top 20 handler endpoints ranked by total request volume. Shows where the majority of traffic is directed.
panels.title: Top 20 Handlers by Request Volume

panels.description: Top 20 handler endpoints ranked by estimated bytes transferred (request rate weighted by average response duration as a proxy for volume).
panels.title: Top 20 Handlers by Bytes (Weighted Volume)

panels.description: Proxy request rate broken down by datasource handler route. Shows which datasource integrations generate the most query traffic.
panels.title: Proxy Request Rate by Datasource

panels.description: Compares current proxy request volume with the same period 7 days ago. Dashed line represents historical data for trend comparison.
panels.title: Proxy Volume Trend -- Current vs 7d Ago

panels.description: Week-over-week comparison of total request volume. Current rate overlaid with the same time window from 7 days ago to reveal growth or decline trends.
panels.title: Request Volume Growth -- WoW

panels.description: Peak (max_over_time) vs average request rate over a sliding window. Helps identify bursty traffic patterns and capacity headroom.
panels.title: Peak vs Average Request Rate

panels.description: Dual-axis correlation view: request rate (left Y-axis) plotted against P95 response latency (right Y-axis). Reveals whether volume spikes correlate with latency degradation.
panels.title: Volume vs Latency Correlation

panels.description: Request duration distribution across all handlers. Shows P50, P90, P95, and P99 percentiles to understand the spread of response times under current traffic load.
panels.title: Request Duration Distribution

title: Grafana — Volume & Traffic Analytics
